overview.description: The Collaborative Investment Series Trust - Adaptive Core ETF (RULE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively-managed fund that invests in a wide array of securities of any asset class, market capitalization, geography, credit quality, and maturity. The fund seeks current income and long-term capital appreciation. RULE was launched on Nov 1, 2021 and is issued by Mohr Funds.
